cards.front: What is the primary focus of the chalk and talk method?
cards.back: Delivery of lecture material by the instructor

cards.front: What type of presentation is often used in conjunction with the chalk and talk method?
What is the main advantage of using PowerPoint presentations in the chalk and talk method?
cards.back: Visual aids can enhance student engagement and understanding

cards.front: What is the primary role of the instructor in the chalk and talk method?
cards.back: To deliver lecture material and facilitate student learning

cards.front: What is the potential drawback of relying solely on the chalk and talk method?
cards.back: Limited opportunity for student participation and engagement
